evals.name: basic-run-all
evals.expected_output: Detects vitest from vitest.config.ts, checks docker-only-tests rule, runs via wrapper + docker-test.sh

assertions.name: uses-wrapper
assertions.description: Must use the centralized wrapper for YAML status tracking

assertions.name: detects-docker-rule
assertions.description: Must detect docker-only-tests rule and use docker mode

assertions.name: detects-vitest
assertions.description: Must auto-detect vitest as the framework

assertions.name: no-direct-npm-test
assertions.description: Must NOT use direct npm test — should use wrapper

evals.name: filter-by-name
evals.expected_output: Runs vitest with --grep statusline filter through docker wrapper

assertions.name: has-filter
assertions.description: Must pass the filter string to the test command

evals.name: explicit-framework
evals.expected_output: Uses jest despite vitest.config.ts existing, runs through docker wrapper

assertions.name: uses-jest
assertions.description: Must use jest when explicitly specified

assertions.name: no-vitest
assertions.description: Must NOT auto-detect vitest when framework is explicit

evals.name: pasted-text-sanitization
evals.prompt:
/run-tests [Pasted text from terminal]
[32m✓[0m auth test passed
some garbage here
statusline
evals.expected_output: Sanitizes pasted text, strips ANSI, extracts meaningful content, warns user

assertions.name: warns-about-paste
assertions.description: Must warn user about pasted text in arguments

assertions.name: runs-something
assertions.description: Must still attempt to run tests after sanitization

assertions.name: smart-filter-extraction
assertions.description: Must extract 'statusline' as the real filter, not terminal noise like '✓ auth test passed'

assertions.name: no-checkmark-in-filter
assertions.description: Must NOT include unicode checkmark artifact in the test filter
